items.name: Abater Foundation
items.description: Abater Foundation is a non-profit advancing open networking and SONiC adoption in research and community settings.

items.name: BDBOS
items.description: BDBOS is the German federal authority for digital radio for public safety, exploring SONiC for sovereign open-network infrastructure.

items.name: CMKL University
items.description: CMKL University (Thailand) uses SONiC for research and academic networking, contributing to the next generation of open-networking engineers.

items.name: EPFL
items.description: EPFL is a leading Swiss technical university researching programmable networks and SONiC-based infrastructure.

items.name: University of Rome Tor Vergata
items.description: The University of Rome Tor Vergata conducts networking research leveraging SONiC for academic and experimental deployments.
